name: Herbed Wild Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, sauté the onions until tender, about 5 minutes.
2. Add rice; cook for 8-10 minutes.
3. Add broth, sage, thyme, and salt. Pour into an ungreased 1 1/2 quart casserole.
4. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 70-80 minutes, or until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed.
Diabetic Exchanges: One serving (prepared with margarine and low-sodium broth and no salt) equals 1 starch, 1 fat.
